system.description:
What it does (SRD): Thick hide or similar quality gives damage reduction 2/—: each successful weapon hit has 2 points of damage ignored unless a listed bypass applies (this template has no bypass, i.e. DR 2/—).

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, the DR is under Capability grants (damage reduction), not in Mechanical effects. When you apply weapon damage, combine it with any other DR from gear or traits per the normal rules.
